insight: In a Wincer standoff where both players have Wincers, the player who fires first may actually get the better end of the exchange if they have a stack of Ferals to click after forcing the opponent to absorb, killing more than 6 Ferals' worth of value — though this is highly position-dependent.
author: consensus
context: 307th asked for analysis of a game featuring Wincer standoffs; silentslayers and lyra1712 discussed whether going in first was good or bad.

insight: The Master Bot employs a 'freeze you to death' strategy using a specific unit or combination, implying it predictably commits to a freezing/tempo-locking line that human players can anticipate and counter.
author: velizar_
context: velizar_ briefly noted the bot uses a 'freeze you to death' strategy in reference to an unspecified game or set being discussed.
